description_long: This object is a modern, angular toilet constructed from a material resembling white marble with subtle gray veining. The design features a rectangular cistern with a visible flush lever on the right side, and a matching rectangular seat and base, giving it a geometric, monolithic appearance. The seat and lid are integrated into the overall blocky form, with no visible separation or curvature typical of traditional toilets. The flush lever is metallic and projects outward, providing a functional accent to the otherwise minimalist design. The base is solid and extends to the floor, indicating a floor-mounted installation. The overall finish is smooth and hard, with a slightly glossy sheen that reflects light subtly.
description: A modern, blocky white marble toilet with a rectangular cistern and a visible flush lever, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular seat, solid base, and the flush lever protruding from the right side of the cistern.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the flush lever and the geometric, monolithic profile of the cistern and seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat back of the cistern and the flush lever extending from the left (relative to this view).
description_view_3: Left side view reveals the uninterrupted, blocky form of the cistern and seat, with no visible flush mechanism.
